legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is legal in Russia / Россия. Medical cannabis is limited. Distribution is restricted.

notes_normalized: Cannabis is legal in Russia / Россия. Medical cannabis is limited. Distribution is restricted.
notes_raw: {{main|Cannabis in Russia}} Possession of up to {{cvt|6|g|frac=5}} of cannabis (or {{cvt|2|g|frac=20|disp=comma}} of hashish) is an administrative offense, punishable by a fine of [[Russian ruble|₽]]5,000 or detention of up to 15 days. Possession of larger amounts is a criminal offense. Foreign nationals and stateless individuals who violate the law are subject to deportation regardless of the amount.<ref>{{cite web | url = http://www.consultant.ru/cons/cgi/online.cgi?req=doc&ts=164469974506312461340936923&cacheid=994B2ACA3517C672CBCF7A2398087641&mode=splus&base=LAW&n=310901&dst=2083&rnd=62E8B8E346501CD4CE50DFE5E998C343#09158851242449872 | script-title = ru:КОДЕКС РОССИЙСКОЙ ФЕДЕРАЦИИ ОБ АДМИНИСТРАТИВНЫХ ПРАВОНАРУШЕНИЯХ | access-date = 5 December 2018 | language = ru | archive-date = 26 February 2021 | archive-url = https://web.archive.org/web/20210226184336/http://www.consultant.ru/cons/cgi/online.cgi?req=doc&ts=164469974506312461340936923&cacheid=994B2ACA3517C672CBCF7A2398087641&mode=splus&base=LAW&n=310901&dst=2083&rnd=62E8B8E346501CD4CE50DFE5E998C343#09158851242449872 | url-status = live }}</ref>

facts.penalty: punishable by a fine of ₽ 5,000 or detention of up to 15 days.
